description: The generated TypeScript SDK now includes JSDoc documentation derived from C# XML docs. Summaries, remarks, parameters, return values, callback parameters, and enum values from the C# source are preserved in the generated TypeScript SDK surface. The C# API XML docs were also migrated to language-neutral ATS format, ensuring all polyglot SDKs (TypeScript, Python, Go, Java) receive accurate documentation without C#-specific XML shapes.
name: TypeScript SDK APIs now include JSDoc from C# XML docs
